name: Alligator Sauce Piquant-1
recipeIngredient: 5 Pounds Alligator meat, trimmed and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a dark roux by combining olive oil and flour in a large pan over medium heat. Stir constantly until the mixture turns dark brown.
2. Add chopped onion, green onion, bell pepper, and celery to the roux. Cover and cook on medium heat until the onions become translucent, stirring occasionally about 5-7 minutes.
3. Add chopped tomatoes and continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Stir in water until you have a thick liquid consistency.
5. Add garlic, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, salt, Tabasco sauce, white wine, and tomato sauce. Mix well to combine all ingredients evenly.
6. Add the cubed alligator meat and enough water to cover the meat by about 2 inches. Stir gently to mix.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, stirring frequently until it returns to a simmer.
8. Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and occasionally stir to prevent the sauce from sticking or burning. Cook for 3-4 hours, or until the alligator meat is tender.
9. Serve the sauce over cooked rice or spaghetti with Parmesan cheese. Freeze leftovers in individual serving-size containers. This recipe is intended for large gatherings, as indicated by the significant quantity of ingredients used.
